columns.Name: EXT_DATA_ELEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated Primary Key. Uniquely identifies a record.

columns.Name: UPDATABLE_DATA_ELEMENT
columns.Comments: Determines if Data element can be updated in Results UI

columns.Name: VO_NAME
columns.Comments: VO_NAME - To show meaningful information instead showing ID values in Result UI

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: BASE_DATA_ELEMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Base Name of the Data Element

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The date from which the data element is active.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The date till when the data element is active.

columns.Name: REPORT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: The record id of the data element

columns.Name: XML_TAG_NAME
columns.Comments: XML Tag Name of data element

columns.Name: SHORT_CODE
columns.Comments: Short Code for the extract data element.

columns.Name: TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Data Element type eg: DBI Group, Rule, etc.

columns.Name: DATA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Data Type of the Data Element

columns.Name: DBI_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Database Item Group Id for Database Item Group type data element

columns.Name: RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Fast Formula Id for Rule Type data element

columns.Name: EXT_PARAM_ID
columns.Comments: Parameter Id for Parameter type data element

columns.Name: STRING_VALUE
columns.Comments: The value of String for string type data element

columns.Name: GROUP_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Group function code, eg; SUM, COUNT, MIN, etc

columns.Name: GROUP_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Record Id for group type data element

columns.Name: GROUP_DATA_ELEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Data Element Id for group type data element

columns.Name: FUNCTION_EXPRESSION
columns.Comments: Function expression relating to conditional grouping, calculation element or decode values

columns.Name: TRANSFORMED_EXPRESSION
columns.Comments: Transformed expression: conditional grouping expression transformed into equivalent SQL

columns.Name: DEFAULT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Default value for data element

columns.Name: REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Data Element Required Flag

columns.Name: HIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Data Element Hide flag

columns.Name: UI_HIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determines whether this data element's value is shown in the Results UI or not.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Decides whether the data element is a context or not. Based on this View Archive Result UI will display the value in different region

columns.Name: MARK_AS_CHANGED
columns.Comments: This flag indicates that this data element has to be processed and displayed in report irrespective of whether it is changed or not.

columns.Name: KEY_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag identifies if this data element is a unique key data element in the record.

columns.Name: INFORMATION_LABEL
columns.Comments: UI Prompt /Label

columns.Name: INFORMATION_COLUMN
columns.Comments: Pay_Action_Information column number

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from Legal Entity.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
